clinical_workflow.intended_use: Clinician-controlled documentation scaffold for warfarin/inr result review.
clinical_workflow.not_for: Not for autonomous diagnosis, treatment selection, dosing, disposition, admission/discharge, procedural, imaging, referral, or emergency management decisions.

source_phase1.reason_for_inclusion: Common Cardiology outpatient documentation scenario suitable as clinician-controlled note scaffolding rather than autonomous clinical advice.
source_phase1.distinct_purpose: Distinct results-review workflow focused on documenting clinician review/discussion of results related to warfarin/inr result review.
source_phase1.duplicate_check_notes: Cleaned Phase 1 candidate. Exact ID is unique within this revised index and must be checked against existing_workflow_ids.json and alias inventory before import; no close baseline workflow assigned in this cleaned index.

safety_notes: No autonomous diagnosis or treatment recommendation is intended.
Red flags are documentation prompts only.
red_flag_prompts: severe or rapidly worsening symptoms documented if assessed
abnormal vital signs documented if measured
new neurological, cardiorespiratory, or systemic concern documented if assessed
clinician concern requiring escalation documented if present

workflow_identity.evidence_relationship: NG196 supports clinician review of anticoagulation quality, bleeding or stroke risk context, patient preferences, and an entered anticoagulation decision when warfarin is used for AF; it does not interpret an INR or change a dose.

history_draft.text: Warfarin/INR result review. [Reason for review]. [Result source/date]. [Clinician interpretation documented]. [Patient questions/concerns]. [Clinician-entered plan if discussed]. [Additional history].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Vital signs documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Cardiovascular examination documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Respiratory examination documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Peripheral perfusion / edema documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered ECG reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Blood pressure or home readings reviewed.
investigation_options.output_text: Blood pressure or home readings reviewed.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Cardiac or laboratory results reviewed.

plan_options.text: Safety-netting documented if discussed by clinician.
Follow-up documented if arranged by clinician.
Patient questions or counseling discussion documented if discussed.
plan_options.output_text: Patient questions or counseling discussion documented.

clinical_blockers: Warfarin indication, target INR, actual result and date, trend, missed doses, diet, alcohol, interactions, illness, bleeding or thrombosis symptoms, clinician interpretation, dose decision, repeat interval, escalation, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
